programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Australia’s ambulance crews are there for everyday people having their worst days. Natalie and Leonard comfort a school boy who’s fallen metres out of a tree. MICA paramedic Cam uses everything in his arsenal to stabilise a 78-year-old

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: In rugged bushland, a car has crashed one hundred metres down a ravine. Rescuing the injured driver turns into a nightmare for flight paramedic Ray. And can a teenager survive a terrifying fall through a skylight.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations.
